name: Weifu High-Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Weifu High-Technology Group Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells diesel fuel injection, exhaust after-treatment, and air management system products primarily in the People's Republic of China. It operates through three segments: Auto Fuel Injection System, Air Management System, and Automotive Post Processing System. The company's fuel injection system products include inline pumps, injectors, distribution pumps, spare parts, and filter products, as well as delivery valves, nozzles, and plungers. Its air management system products comprise gasoline and diesel turbo chargers; and exhaust after-treatment system products consist of catalysts, catalytics, and mufflers. The company also produces and sells engine accessories and purifiers. It offers diesel fuel injection systems that are used in diesel engines for trucks, passenger cars, buses, construction machinery, marine products, and generator sets; exhaust after-treatment system products for the manufacturers of automobile, motorcycle, and general machinery; and air management system products for small-bore diesel engine plants, six-cylinder diesel engine manufacturers, light and heavy commercial vehicles, and passenger cars. The company also exports its products to the Americas, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. Weifu High-Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China.
